command_eligibility.reason: C4-C is offline trajectory validation only. Dynamic stability, servo speed/accel limits, supervised hardware safe mode and operator approval are still required before any stand command.

safety_policy.expected_low_clearance: distal lower-leg fork around rigid TPU 90D foot cylinder

trajectory_policy.reason: q=0 visual-zero is not a valid four-foot contact stance and direct interpolation was shown to create lower-leg ground penetration in C4-C1.
trajectory_policy.solver_order: solved descending from C4-A for IK robustness, then reversed as ascending rest-to-stand trajectory
